comment: Spoofs ARCore's containsMatchingProfile gate so the SDK accepts unsupported devices (INMO Air 3 and similar). Validated against ARCore 1.52 vc 253140493. Replacement convention: ?? in replacement = preserve original byte at that position.

patterns.comment: Anchored on the b.ne to stack_chk_fail (?? ?? ?? 54) immediately followed by 'and w0,w19,1' (60 02 00 12) and the canonical 0x60-frame epilogue (ldp/ldr/add sp/ret). Patches the AND to 'mov w0,#1' (20 00 80 52) so the function returns 1 unconditionally while the calls and cleanup above run normally.
